notes: Text Region Multiple Information Perception Network. Plug-and-play module enhancing segmentation-based text detectors. ICASSP 2024. arxiv:2401.10017.

name: RoBERTa-large
notes: RoBERTa: A Robustly Optimized BERT Pretraining Approach. 2019.

name: RoDLA
architecture: DINO-based detector with InternImage backbone + channel attention blocks
notes: RoDLA: Benchmarking the Robustness of Document Layout Analysis Models. DINO-based architecture using InternImage backbone (ImageNet-22K pretrained) with channel attention and average pooling in encoder for perturbation-resistant features. 96.0 mAP on clean PubLayNet-val. CVPR 2024. arXiv 2403.14442.

name: RT-DETRv2-X
notes: Efficient hybrid encoder with IoU-aware query selection. 54.3 mAP on COCO val.

name: RT-DETRv2-X
notes: RT-DETRv2: Improved Baseline with Bag-of-Freebies for Real-Time Detection Transformer. X-large variant achieves 54.3 AP on COCO val2017. Discrete sampling operators and optimized training recipe. arXiv Jul 2024.

name: RT-DETRv3-R101
notes: RT-DETRv3: Real-time End-to-End Object Detection with Hierarchical Dense Positive Supervision. R101 variant achieves 54.6 AP on COCO val2017. WACV 2025 Oral. arXiv Sep 2024.

name: RVT
notes: Multi-view transformer for robotic manipulation with virtual camera rendering

name: RVT-2
notes: 6x faster training than RVT, 19pp higher success rate on RLBench 18 tasks

name: SAC
notes: Off-policy max-entropy RL for continuous control

name: SAM-Med3D
vendor: University Medical Center Hamburg-Eppendorf et al.
notes: Segment Anything Model extended to 3D volumetric medical images. Trained on 21K segmentation masks.

name: SAM 2 (Hiera-L)
notes: Promptable segmentation for images and video. Strong zero-shot transfer. 2024.

name: Scribe V1
notes: ElevenLabs Scribe V1 commercial ASR API.

name: SegDecNet
architecture: Joint segmentation-decision network for surface defect detection
notes: End-to-end surface defect detection with SegDecNet. TPAMI 2021.

name: SegFormer-B5
architecture: Hierarchical Mix Transformer (MiT-B5) + lightweight MLP decoder
notes: Seminal efficient transformer for semantic segmentation. MiT-B5 backbone with simple all-MLP decoder. 51.8 mIoU on ADE20K val. No positional encoding; produces multi-scale features. NeurIPS 2021.

name: SegMamba
notes: Long-range sequential modeling with Mamba for 3D medical image segmentation. 2024.

name: SegMAN-L
notes: Omni-scale context modeling combining Mamba SSM for long-range global context and local attention for fine-grained details. Large variant achieves 53.2 mIoU on ADE20K. CVPR 2025.

name: Segment Anything Model (SAM)
notes: Imported from Papers with Code dump

name: SegVol
notes: SAM-based universal volumetric segmentation model. Supports semantic and spatial prompts. Trained on 90K unlabeled CT scans.

name: SeMask-L
architecture: Swin-L encoder with Semantic Attention + Mask2Former decoder
notes: Incorporates semantic information into the encoder via Semantic Attention at multiple stages. SeMask-L + Mask2Former achieves 49.35 mIoU on ADE20K val. ICCVW 2023.

name: SEMv3
architecture: Keypoint Offset Regression (KOR) module; split-and-merge paradigm for table separation line detection
notes: IJCAI 2024. Fast and robust separation-line-based approach. Achieves TEDS 97.30 and TEDS-Struct 97.50 on PubTabNet.

name: SenseNova-U1-A3B-MoT
notes: Added from Papers with Code MMLU-Pro refresh on 2026-05-19.

name: SimpleNet
notes: Simple yet effective. Competitive with complex methods on MVTec.

name: Simulus
notes: First planning-free world model to reach human-level IQM and median HNS on Atari 100k. arXiv 2025.

name: Pulse STT
notes: Pulse STT API. Smallest AI documentation reports streaming ESB LibriSpeech Clean and Other WER values.

name: SmoLM2 (1.7B)
notes: Added from Papers with Code MMLU-Pro refresh on 2026-05-19.

name: SmoLM2 (instruct, 1.7B)
notes: Added from Papers with Code MMLU-Pro refresh on 2026-05-19.

name: SoViT-400m/14
notes: Shape-Optimized ViT derived from compute-optimal scaling laws. 400M params, patch14. Pre-trained on WebLI (contrastive + reconstruction head), finetuned on ImageNet-1K at 224px. NeurIPS 2023. Paper: arxiv:2305.13035.

name: SpEL-large
architecture: Structured prediction entity linking over RoBERTa-large

name: SPRINT
architecture: OTSL (Optimized Table Structure Language) sequence prediction; script-agnostic design
notes: Script-agnostic table structure recognition. ICDAR 2024. Lower latency than MTL-TabNet (1.52 vs 2.35s per image). TEDS-Struct 95.71 on PubTabNet.

name: Logistic Regression (SQuAD baseline)
notes: Original SQuAD 1.1 baseline from Rajpurkar et al. 2016.

name: SRepair
notes: Multi-LLM agent APR system. Fixes 300 single-function bugs in Defects4J. 2024.

name: SSAE + Softmax (Explainable ASD)
notes: Stacked Sparse Autoencoder with softmax classifier trained on fMRI functional connectivity. Head movement filtering (FD > 0.2mm) critical for performance. Published in eClinicalMedicine 2025.

name: SSD300 (VGG-16)
architecture: Single-shot multibox detector with VGG-16 backbone, 300x300 input
notes: Single-shot detector using multi-scale feature maps and default boxes. 300x300 input variant. Pascal VOC 2012 test: 72.4 mAP (VOC07+12), 77.5 mAP (+COCO pre-training). ECCV 2016. arxiv:1512.02325.

name: SSD512 (VGG-16)
architecture: Single-shot multibox detector with VGG-16 backbone, 512x512 input
notes: Single-shot detector with larger 512x512 input for improved small-object detection. Pascal VOC 2012 test: 74.9 mAP (VOC07+12), 80.0 mAP (+COCO pre-training). ECCV 2016. arxiv:1512.02325.

name: ST-MoE-32B
notes: Stable and transferable sparse expert model. SuperGLUE SOTA in 2022.

name: ST-Transformer

name: SumHiS
architecture: Extractive summarization exploiting hidden document structure
notes: SumHiS: Extractive Summarization Exploiting Hidden Structure. arXiv:2406.08215 (Jun 2024). Uses latent sentence-graph structure for extractive selection. Achieves SOTA ROUGE-2 (32.52) among extractive models on CNN/DM by exploiting paragraph-level hidden structure with semantic filtering.

name: SuperSimpleNet
architecture: Unified unsupervised + supervised anomaly detection with feature adaptation
notes: SuperSimpleNet: Unifying Unsupervised and Supervised Learning for Fast and Reliable Surface Defect Detection. ICPR 2024.

name: SVM with Connectivity Features

notes: Hierarchical vision transformer. 53.5 mIoU on ADE20K. ICCV 2021 Best Paper.

architecture: Layout Pointer mechanism; span-aware contrastive supervision; reformulates TSR as text region pointing
notes: IJCAI 2024. Achieves SOTA on PubTabNet, FinTabNet, SynthTabNet. Smallest TEDS/TEDS-Struct gap among compared methods.

notes: Li et al. ECCV 2024. First method reported to complete CARLA Leaderboard v2 tasks. seed — verify

notes: Transforms 1D time series into 2D space to exploit 2D CNNs for temporal variation modeling.

name: UNETR

name: UniTable Large
architecture: ViT encoder + autoregressive decoder; self-supervised pretraining on unannotated tabular images
notes: Unified framework for table structure, cell content, and bbox via language modeling objective. Achieves SOTA on PubTabNet, FinTabNet, SynthTabNet. Published Mar 2024.

name: UniTabNet
architecture: Vision-language model bridging image encoder and text decoder for table structure parsing
notes: Bridges vision and language models for table structure recognition. Evaluated on PubTabNet, PubTables1M, WTW, iFLYTAB. Published Sep 2024.

name: Universal-1
notes: AssemblyAI Universal-1: multi-domain ASR model released April 2024. Evaluated on LibriSpeech, AMI, Earnings-22, and other benchmarks.

name: UniXcoder
notes: Unified cross-modal pre-training for code. ACL 2022.

name: VALL-E 2
notes: VALL-E 2. First system achieving human parity on LibriSpeech. Grouped code modeling + repetition aware sampling. Jun 2024.

name: Vicuna-13B + Whisper Q-Former
notes: Connecting Speech Encoder and LLM for ASR. arXiv:2309.13963.

name: VILA-1.5 40B
notes: Auto-created for VQA v2 benchmark results

name: ViT-22B
notes: Largest dense vision model. 5.5x larger than ViT-e.

name: ViT-Adapter-L (BEiT-3)
architecture: ViT-L with spatial prior adapter + BEiT-3 pre-training + Mask2Former head
notes: ViT-Adapter bridges the gap between plain ViT and hierarchical backbones for dense predictions. BEiT-3 pre-trained ViT-L via ViT-Adapter sets SOTA of 62.8 MS mIoU on ADE20K val. ICLR 2023 Spotlight.

name: ViT-CoMer-L
notes: Plain ViT backbone augmented with CNN multi-scale feature interaction for dense predictions. Large variant achieves 62.1 mIoU on ADE20K val. Pre-training-free design. CVPR 2024.

name: ViTDet-H (MAE)
architecture: Plain ViT-H backbone with simple feature pyramid, Cascade Mask RCNN head
notes: Explores plain non-hierarchical ViT backbones for object detection without FPN modifications. ViT-Huge variant achieves 59.5 mask AP on LVIS v1.0 minival with MAE pretraining. ECCV 2022. arXiv:2203.16527.

name: VITS
notes: VITS: end-to-end TTS with conditional VAE and adversarial training. ICML 2021.

architecture: Large multimodal LM with audio encoder

name: YourTTS
